title: The Mediation Act, 2023
full_text: The Mediation Act, 2023 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: A2023-32 Act Number: 32 Enactment Date: 2023-09-14 Act Year: 2023 Short Title: The Mediation Act, 2023 Long Title: An Act to promote and facilitate mediation, especially institutional mediation, for resolution of disputes, commercial or otherwise, enforce mediated settlement agreements, provide for a body for registration of mediators, to encourage community mediation and to make online mediation as acceptable and cost effective process and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Department of Legal Affairs Enforcement Date: 9-10-2023 Schedule 1. Schedule 1 Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2.
